name: Hackathon Setup Guide
description: This guide provides a step-by-step process for setting up Featherless.ai, an AI inference platform, and integrating it into your projects.

name: Getting Started with Featherless.ai
description: The guide covers signing up for Feather Premium, obtaining an API key, and choosing a model for your use case.

name: API Calls and Endpoints
description: This section explains how to make API calls using Python Requests and OpenAI SDK, and lists the core API endpoints.

name: Troubleshooting Common Errors
description: The guide provides solutions for common errors such as 401 Unauthenticated and 500 Internal Server Error.

name: Concurrency Limits
description: This section explains the concurrency limits and costs associated with different model sizes and subscription tiers.

name: Application Guides
description: Featherless.ai offers detailed application guides to help integrate the platform into existing projects and workflows.

name: Video Walkthrough
description: A video walkthrough is available to demonstrate the use of Featherless.ai and a live use case.
context: Featherless AI - Quick Start and Live Demo.mov
